{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232011196563E552F53639ED1DBF"}"},"total":128},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7188074304506954557","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书我强推你们看，书里面的内容丰富、很惊悚。书里面有很多烧脑的环节，谜团也非常多，很精彩。而且女主很聪明、冷静，这个性格我很喜欢。爱看恐怖怪谈的人可以入手！再说一遍，这本书真的很好看！强推荐！！！（希望作者大大不要烂文啊！！！我真的超爱这本书的！！！）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1673604046,"group_id":"7167698796179098628","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"大家好！我希望我的书能带给大家欢乐与笑容！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8flNSpZPzif1NOt1mRLFz6Zg4KuZuxKhcnZ3DqElokF","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/da18f4fd14e34363aa56ccaa767e3416~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793174&x-signature=ZdqtCAg7bZXrlXB2kdtEdMtZl3o%3D","user_id":"2032312262862606","user_name":"开霜"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2032312262862606","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7167698796179098628","book_info":{"abstract":"【系统+惊悚+循环+烧脑】
诡异复苏，怪谈降临。
睡梦中的叶南汐被一阵刺耳的嘶鸣声拉入到诡异的怪谈世界。
在这里，赢了，就会获得百万现金奖励，输了，就小命休已。
第一个开启的怪谈是宿舍寝室。
【请仔细阅读规则】
【王念念、温白、周珂、江宁、裴昭月和你住在一个寝室。但寝室里只有五个人。】
【你可以无条件相信王念念，前提是她手上带着红绳。】
【你的对铺桌子和床是颠倒的，不存在舍友在桌子上睡觉的情况。】
【十点钟要准时熄灯，并锁好门窗，包括阳台上的门。】
【熄灯后，会有宿管来查寝，不管发生什么情况不要开灯，不要开门！】
【室友会打开房门，请不要以任何方式阻止她。】
【你在宿舍中养了一只白色的猫，如果它的眼睛变成蓝色，请立即杀死它！】
【切记，宿舍不是绝对安全的！】","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2ob8eb5f54321f53dcdb4b596c839475e5~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"快乐肥宅唐小糖","author_id":"","book_id":"7167698796179098628","book_name":"规则怪谈：诡异寝室","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1338人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7167705767506608648","read_count":"1338","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"146838"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.3","serial_count":"70","tags":"悬疑脑洞,系统,穿越,直播,灵异,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2ob8eb5f54321f53dcdb4b596c839475e5~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779451879&x-signature=0Fv47x7SMwPXhzCBb%2FPX54XY4Bs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"975957789773560","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.9964819e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232011196563E552F53639ED1DBF"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":34,"for
